commands.review_summary:
The PR changes web UI Markdown, chat tool-output rendering, copy handling, styles, and focused tests so half-block QR/block-art text renders as whitespace-preserving block art in chat and sidebar surfaces.

PR surface: Source +170, Tests +147. Total +317 across 14 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main lacks half-block handling in Markdown and expanded raw tool-card rendering, and the linked source PR supplies browser screenshots showing broken QR output; I did not run a live browser repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This protected maintainer-labeled PR has no concrete automated repair finding; the next action is maintainer landing judgment with visual proof/check status review.

target.title: UI: render half-block QR output in web chat
target.body:
## Summary
- Replaces the uneditable source branch from #51868 with a narrow implementation of the same user-facing fix.
- Detects UTF-8 half-block QR/block art and renders it with tight line-height, stable foreground/background colors, and horizontal overflow behavior that does not clip wide QR blocks.
- Covers raw tool/sidebar output and regular chat markdown so QR text does not need pre-existing triple backticks.
- Preserves leading/trailing QR quiet-zone whitespace when wrapping output.

## Credit
This carries forward the fix idea and reproduction from @emg110 in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/51868. Thanks @emg110 for the original report, implementation direction, and proof.

## Review findings addressed
- Greptile: keep half-block detection comments accurate and add sidebar pre/code font inheritance.
- Codex: detect raw half-block text before markdown turns it into paragraphs, preserve quiet-zone padding, and avoid clipping wide QR blocks behind code-block wrapper overflow.

## Validation
- pnpm -s vitest run ui/src/ui/markdown.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/tool-helpers.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- Codex /review must pass before opening the PR.

## Notes
No CHANGELOG.md edit is included because OpenClaw release generation owns changelog entries for normal PRs.

Clownfish 🐠 replacement reef notes:
- Cluster: repair-51868-qr-rendering
- Source PRs: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/51868
- Credit: Credit @emg110 for the original fix idea and source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/51868 in the replacement PR body.; Do not edit CHANGELOG.md for the normal PR; OpenClaw release generation owns changelog entries. If maintainers add release notes later, the entry should preserve @emg110 attribution.; The replacement must not carry unrelated commits or broad drift from GoPlausible/openclaw:main.
- Validation: pnpm -s vitest run ui/src/ui/markdown.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/tool-helpers.test.ts; pnpm check:changed

fish notes: model gpt-5.5, reasoning medium; reviewed against 6e155e3bbf4b.
